text: Hello? Are you? Good afternoon, this is Jacob. I've got you. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Alabama State Relief Program. So, have you received any notification about these benefits yet? So, I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan?
